title: cyperus subtilis
intro: Cyperus subtilis, a type of sedge plant, is a perennial species native to tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus subtilis include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems and wounds. Herbal preparations of Cyperus subtilis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
